text: What is the operational limitation of security equipment such as weld logs?

options.text: Cannot be used on steel structures
The weld logs can be cut open
High vulnerability to sea spray damage

explanation: Assuming "weld logs" refers to physical security barriers like weld locks or welded bars, their operational limitation is that they can be compromised. With sufficient time and tools, such as cutting equipment, even robust welded structures can be breached by determined intruders.
